tensor_source: live Redis (tensor:cells) at time of generation

cells.rationale: modularity theorem verification (Wiles)
cells.correct_null_stratifier: n/a — theorem check, no null applies
cells.note: Calibration anchor; algebraic identity by proof.

cells.rationale: modularity theorem verification via Lhash
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: modularity theorem verification via trace_hash
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: BSD parity + full BSD identity at 10^-12; theorem + definitional identity
cells.note: Calibration anchor; algebraic identity by BSD statement.

cells.rationale: BSD parity across rank strata; theorem check
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: BSD parity verification under variance decomposition; theorem check
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: Hasse bound |a_p| <= 2 sqrt(p); theorem
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: high-Sha parity (-1)^rank = root_number; definitional constraint on sha>=9 stratum
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: Scholz reflection |r3(K*)-r3(K)|<=1; theorem (Scholz 1932)
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: torsion primes subset of nonmax primes; Serre open-image theorem
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: torsion primes subset of nonmax primes; theorem check via Galois image stratification
cells.note: Calibration anchor.

cells.rationale: Lehmer bound touched at specific num_ram strata (1,2); measurement-existence claim, not a null-testable correlation
cells.note: Claim is 'bound touched' — an existential observation about specific polynomials, not a statistical coupling. No null applies.

cells.rationale: Lehmer bound touched at degrees 10 and 20; measurement-existence claim
cells.note: Same rationale as F014:P021.

cells.rationale: Mahler measure projection verifies Lehmer floor structure; 2026-04-18 Charon trinomial asymptotic is a theorem-like result
cells.note: Measurement/theorem, not null-tested.

cells.rationale: LAYER 1: bulk deficit shrinks monotonically with conductor (Duenez-HKMS excised ensemble)
cells.note: CORRECT match. Claim is conductor-scaling; stratifier is conductor_decile. Default NULL_BSWCD@v2 appropriate.

cells.rationale: first-gap preprocessing (coordinate change, not stratification); deficit magnitude depends on coord choice
cells.note: P050 is a preprocessing projection. No block-shuffle null is meaningful; the +2 records that the deficit survives the preprocessing. If a null is desired, it must be on the downstream statistic, not on P050 itself.

cells.rationale: N(T) unfolding preprocessing; coordinate change
cells.note: Same as P050. Preprocessing cells are not null-tested in the Class-1 sense.

cells.rationale: self-audit under block-shuffle; meta-claim that F011's own instrument confirms F011
cells.correct_null_stratifier: torsion_bin is balanced for 5-20 strata per Pattern 26; acceptable
cells.note: Stratifier corrected from class_size (DEGENERATE) to torsion_bin on 2026-04-18. Durable residual z=4.19 stands under the corrected stratifier.

cells.rationale: deficit uniform across num_bad_primes strata (stratum-uniform claim)
cells.note: MISMATCH. Claim is uniformity across nbp strata; null should stratify by nbp to test per-stratum durability. Current null tests conductor structure, orthogonal to the claim.

cells.rationale: deficit uniform across rank strata; stratum-uniform claim
cells.note: MISMATCH. Claim is per-rank uniformity; needs rank-stratified null.

cells.rationale: deficit holds across CM/non-CM; stratum-uniform
cells.current_null_stratifier: conductor_decile (default); also z=5.53 under P025 stratifier per reaudit_F011_7cells 043ba782
cells.note: Per reaudit_F011_7cells commit 043ba782, this cell was re-audited with appropriate stratifier and survived at z=5.53. CORRECT.

cells.rationale: deficit holds across semistable/additive; stratum-uniform
cells.note: MISMATCH. Needs re-audit under semistable_flag stratifier.

cells.rationale: Katz-Sarnak class discriminates (SO_even vs SO_odd); between-class difference after conductor control
cells.correct_null_stratifier: conductor_decile is acceptable: claim is 'K-S class difference survives conductor control'
cells.note: CORRECT — the claim explicitly asserts the difference is NOT conductor-mediated, so preserving conductor marginal and testing the K-S split is the right null.

cells.rationale: root_number stratifier; on EC aliases rank parity
cells.note: MISMATCH per Class 3 discipline; however note that P036 is aliased with P023 rank parity on EC (per edge P036 aliased_on_EC P028, weaver batch 4). Re-audit under root_number == re-audit under rank parity.

cells.rationale: rank-slope interaction: SO_even slope +0.01284 vs SO_odd -0.00216; sign flip across rank-parity cohorts
cells.current_null_stratifier: conductor (default, per NULL_BSWCD@v1 symbol doc: z_block=15.31)
cells.note: MISMATCH. F013 is the canonical Class 2 case. z_block=15.31 was under stratifier=conductor, which tests whether the effect survives conductor control — but the effect IS the rank interaction, so conductor stratification is the wrong null. Flag for re-audit under rank_bin.

cells.rationale: same as F013:P023 — K-S classes on EC alias rank parity, so this is also a rank-slope interaction claim
cells.note: MISMATCH. Same Class 2 issue as F013:P023.

cells.rationale: rank-slope under variance decomposition; same underlying claim
cells.note: MISMATCH.

cells.rationale: rank-slope after unfolding preprocessing; preprocessing does not change claim class
cells.note: MISMATCH.

cells.rationale: self-audit of the rank-slope claim
cells.note: MISMATCH. The self-audit inherited the v1 default and does not match the claim class.

cells.rationale: within-conductor structure beyond pooled slope; per-k sign-uniform claim intersects conductor
cells.note: CORRECT. F015 description: 'Block-shuffle-within-k null VERIFIED the sign-uniform-negative claim at ALL k'. Stratifier matches claim class.

cells.rationale: per-k sign-uniform claim; bad-prime count stratification IS the stratum-uniform axis
cells.note: CORRECT.

cells.rationale: F39 feature permutation as additional null on per-k sign claim
cells.note: CORRECT.

cells.rationale: block-shuffle self-audit on per-k sign claim
cells.note: CORRECT. F015 is the canonical example of a correctly-matched Class 3 audit.

cells.rationale: rank-conditional slope of moment ratio vs log-conductor, interacting with num_bad_primes
cells.current_null_stratifier: joint (rank_bin, conductor_decade) per F041a description W2 test
cells.note: CORRECT (stricter than minimum). W2 used joint (rank, decade) block-shuffle — exceeds Class 2 minimum.

cells.rationale: bad-prime count ladder at rank 2; the nbp axis is the interaction axis
cells.note: CORRECT.

cells.rationale: rank-dependence of the nbp ladder is the defining claim
cells.note: CORRECT.

cells.rationale: semistable-vs-additive split at rank 2 within nbp ladder; T3 test
cells.note: CORRECT. T3 semistable-vs-additive finding 'ladder lives in semistable half' is a Class 3 sub-claim, adequately tested.

cells.rationale: self-audit of the rank-nbp ladder claim
cells.note: CORRECT.

cells.rationale: rank-4 EC in LMFDB have disc=conductor in 2085/2086; LMFDB rank-4 selection is a construction-biased sample (F044 description flags this explicitly as possibility (b))
cells.current_null_stratifier: conductor_decile (would be applied under Class 1 default) — but NULL_BSWCD is INSUFFICIENT for Class 4
cells.correct_null_stratifier: frame-based resample OR theorem check required; NULL_BSWCD does not suffice
cells.note: PROVISIONAL per Class 4. F044 +2 cells are empirical observations on a possibly-biased LMFDB sample. Kill/confirm tests from F044 description: (1) verify the 1 exception; (2) replicate at rank 5; (3) literature scan — Stein, Elkies, Dujella rank-record constructions may have selection bias.

cells.rationale: same as F044:P020; rank-stratified observation on same construction-biased sample
cells.note: PROVISIONAL.

cells.rationale: semistable-only subset of same construction-biased sample
cells.note: PROVISIONAL.

cells.rationale: F022 killed via P001 (feature-dist); P010 (Galois-label) resolves same data. +2 records projection-choice, not null-tested claim
cells.note: Scorer-choice bookkeeping cell (per null_protocol §7). Do not count alongside Class 1-3 +2 cells for density claims.

F013.note: Canonical Class 2 case; all five cells ran under conductor stratifier, should be rank_bin.

F015.note: Canonical Class 3 case; stratifier=num_bad_primes matches claim.

F041a.note: Used joint (rank_bin, conductor_decade) — stricter than minimum Class 2.

F044.note: Construction-biased sample per F044's own caveat list; NULL_BSWCD insufficient.

reaudit_queue.reason: Class 3 stratum-uniform claim across reduction type
Class 2 rank-slope claim; default null used wrong stratifier
Class 2 rank-slope claim (K-S aliases rank on EC)
Class 2 rank-slope claim under variance decomp
Class 2 self-audit; inherited v1 default stratifier

reaudit_queue.required_stratifier: n/a — NULL_BSWCD insufficient; need frame-based resample or theorem check

notes_for_sessionA: 10 +2 cells have a stratifier that does not match the claim class — flagged for re-audit under NULL_BSWCD@v2 with the correct stratifier listed per cell.
3 additional +2 cells (all on F044) are flagged PROVISIONAL pending a Class-4-appropriate null (frame-based resample or theorem check). NULL_BSWCD is not the right tool for these.

15 +2 cells (F001-F009, F014) are Class 5 algebraic/theorem identities — +2 is correct but carries different semantics than null-tested cells. Downstream analyses that cluster +2 cells should distinguish.
1 scorer-bookkeeping cell (F022 × P010) should not be counted alongside null-tested +2 for density or robustness metrics.
5 cells on F013 form a coherent block of Class 2 mismatches — re-audit under stratifier=rank_bin would be one operation if batched.
Decision per protocol: this document does NOT demote or promote any cells. SessionA (conductor) owns the re-audit execution and any resulting tier changes.
